summary: Full E2E testing of Envol app (FastAPI + React + MongoDB + Claude Sonnet 4.5). 12/12 backend pytest cases pass. Full frontend flow verified: Landing -> Register -> 10-question Onboarding -> Claude AI analysis (score 68/100) -> Dashboard with EXACTLY 8 sidebar items in the requested order -> AI bubble chat (Claude reply received) -> Mon projet save (✓ Enregistré) -> Logout returns to landing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: get_user uses Depends(security) -> a missing Authorization header triggers FastAPI/Starlette HTTPBearer 403 instead of 401. Minor; consider auto_error=False with explicit 401.
JWT_SECRET in /app/backend/.env is a plain dev string ('envol-secret-key-change-in-prod-2026') - acceptable for dev, must be rotated for prod.
Onboarding fallback (when Claude fails) silently returns score=50 with onboarded=True; consider surfacing a non-200 or a flag so frontend can show retry UI.
App.js is large (>600 lines) - splitting into per-component files (Landing, Onboarding, AnalysisResult, Dashboard, AiBubble, ProjectTab, Profile) would improve maintainability.
All required data-testid attributes are present on the 8 sidebar nav items, AI bubble, onboarding inputs/options, project save button, and analysis score - good testability.
test_credentials: Existing: test@envol.com / test123 (already onboarded). Fresh users created during tests with random emails test_*@envol.com / test123.
seed_data_creation: Tests create fresh users per run (test_<uuid>@envol.com); onboarding doc + project doc auto-created by flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover: register/login/me, 10 onboarding questions, onboarding submit (real Claude call ~10-20s), result persistence + onboarded flag, project save, profile update, AI chat, auth-required check. Frontend testid scheme: onboard-input-{qid} for textarea/text, onboard-opt-{qid}-{opt[:10]} for select options, onboard-next-btn for navigate. All 8 sidebar nav-* testids verified. AI bubble: ai-bubble-btn -> ai-input + ai-send-btn -> ai-panel.
